source_metadata.title: 2024/09/12 - Petitions
source_metadata.description:
12 September 2024 | Petitions Committee

Petition of Deb Hayes: Investigate Midwifery Council’s removal of ‘woman & baby’ from Scope of Practice

Submitters:
Midwifery Council, Lesley Clarke, CEO
Kiley Clark, Council Co-chair
Jessica Schreiber, Registrar

Petition of Te Rito Maioha: Implement a 1:4 ratio for children under three years of age attending ECE

Submitters:

Te Rito Maioha: 
Cathy Wilson, Chief Executive, Montessori Aotearoa
Rob McCann, Lead Communications Advisor
Tui Lou Cassidy, Publications Manager, Childspace
Lauren Stafford, Principal, Childspace
 
Ministry of Education:
John Brooker, General Manager, System, Connections & Early Learning Policy
Graham Bussell, Senior Policy Manager, ECE System Investment Policy
Paul Scholey, Senior Policy Manager, ECE System & Regulatory Policy
Isabel Warden, Assistant Policy Analyst, ECE System Investment Policy
Chris Jamieson, Principal Adviser, ECE Operational Policy Design
